suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether "Write tests first" is mandatory or whether `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` may still be true when a worker fixes code before adding regressions; scrutiny reviewers need that field to reflect the actual procedure reliably.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both import-surface rerun reviews observed the same mismatch: worker sessions `64010c1a-d6a6-44dc-b8c8-334561b28747` and `9ef439d9-1e42-4b07-98e3-c0067d2f1f5a` edited production files before adding regression tests, yet each handoff reported `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true` while `.factory/skills/compiler-worker/SKILL.md` says "Write tests first".
